name: Decorative Concrete Curbing
description: Custom-poured concrete landscape curbing that adds clean, permanent borders to flower beds, walkways, and yard features. Choose from 14 colors, 10 stamp patterns, and 4 curb styles to match your home.

name: Landscape Edging
description: Permanent concrete edging that keeps mulch, rock, and soil contained while giving your landscaping a finished, professional look. No more plastic borders that shift and crack.

name: Flower Bed Borders
description: Beautiful, durable concrete borders for flower beds that eliminate the constant maintenance of traditional edging materials. Design curves and shapes that complement your garden layout.

name: Tree Rings
description: Circular concrete curbing around trees that protects root systems, defines mulch areas, and adds a polished detail to your landscape. Custom sized to fit any tree.

name: Driveway Borders
description: Concrete curbing along driveways that prevents gravel spread, defines edges, and adds curb appeal visible from the street. The first thing visitors notice.

name: Walkway Borders
description: Clean concrete borders along walkways and pathways that keep landscaping materials in place and create defined, intentional-looking pathways through your yard.

name: Stamped Concrete Curbing
description: Curbing with impressed patterns that mimic natural stone, brick, or wood grain. 10 stamp patterns available — all the character of premium materials at a fraction of the cost.

name: Custom Color Concrete Curbing
description: 14 integral concrete colors that run through the entire curb — not just painted on top. Color-matched to your home's exterior, stone, or landscape rock for a cohesive look.

name: Mower-Style Curbing
description: A low-profile curb design that lets your mower wheel ride right along the edge. No more hand-trimming. The most practical curb style for homeowners who maintain their own lawn.

name: Commercial Concrete Curbing
description: Large-scale decorative curbing for commercial properties, HOAs, apartment complexes, and municipal projects. Professional appearance with the durability to handle high-traffic areas.

name: Curbing Repair
description: Repair cracked, chipped, or damaged concrete curbing. We match existing colors and patterns to restore your curbing to like-new condition without replacing the entire run.

name: Curbing Re-Sealing
description: Protective sealant application that extends the life of your concrete curbing, restores color vibrancy, and protects against UV fading and water damage.
